Store_Location: The specific location of the Lee's Market store. In this case, this would be the Richmond flagship store.
Quarter: The specific quarter of the year in which the foot traffic data is being reported. In this case, this would be Q2 2025.
Average_Daily_Foot_Traffic: The average number of customers who visited the store each day during the specified quarter. In this case, this would be around 2,700 customers per day.
Data_Source: The source from which the foot traffic data was obtained. This could be from internal reports, third-party data providers, etc.
Date_Reported: The date when the foot traffic data was reported. This helps to know when the numbers were last updated.
